description: Policy for comparison-page selection. A comparison page must help a buyer choose between tools for the same job, not force unrelated AI products into a fake versus page.
default_rule: Auto-select only pairs that share the same primary category and, when a category has workflow_lanes, also share at least one approved workflow lane. Primary-secondary overlap, secondary-secondary overlap, unclassified broad-category pairs, and broad tier-one cross-category pairs are review-only and must not become published comparison pages.
